E.C.U Documentation
Get started
  • Home
  • Marketplace
  • ECUs

4R (Nav Milieu de Gamme)

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 747
Recv ID: 767
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 58
Func Name: Navigation

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "BT2",
    "soft": "0001",
    "version": "0000"
  },
  {
    "diagversion": "36",
    "supplier": "BT2",
    "soft": "0001",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 37632,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "ECU_Default"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 37665,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Virgin or Incomplete configuration"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 49544,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "UCD connection problem"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 49493,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "MDP connection problem"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 49545,
    "dtctype": 4,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CD Changer connection problem"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 39424,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "GPS antenna open circuit"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 39436,
    "dtctype": 2,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "CD Disc error"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 37637,
    "dtctype": 3,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "RadioNav_On output"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 37640,
    "dtctype": 3,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "Power Supply Video Display"
  }
]

    "minbytes": 2,
    "shiftbytescount": 3,
    "replybytes": "5700",
    "sentbytes": "17FF00",
    "name": "ReadDTC",
    "deny_sds": [],
    "sendbyte_dataitems": {
      "MoreDTC": {
        "firstbyte": 3

        "bitoffset": 3

        "firstbyte": 5,
        "bitoffset": 1

    },
    "receivebyte_dataitems": {
      "Output Control Status": {
        "firstbyte": 3
      },
      "Copy System state": {
        "firstbyte": 4
      }
    }
  }
]
